base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of damage_numbers — a ui from 1987 final fantasy. HP/MP damage number pop-ups — 0-9 digits + HIT/MISS/CRITICAL text. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: HP/MP damage number pop-ups — 0-9 digits + HIT/MISS/CRITICAL text
